backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user profile management and contact form submission with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) using AccessControl and MixinAuthorization modules.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the logo text correction feature ('Ek Nayi Umheed' → 'Ek Nayi Ummeed') to the SCLCLogo.tsx file and associated components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to 'Sisodiya Child Learning Centre' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the Home page inside the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About Us section component displaying the center's mission story, director quote card, and four value cards (Compassionate Care, Goal-Oriented Therapy, Holistic Approach, Family Partnership) with stats.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section component with four info cards (address, hours, email, phone) and a form that submits name/phone/email/message inquiries to the backend, handling loading, success, and error states.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying the SCLC logo (white variant), quick navigation links, address, director name, a logo download button, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the full-screen hero section with the SCLC logo, tagline badge, main heading, mission statement, and smooth-scroll CTA buttons, decorated with animated floating icons and blurred gradient circles.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Simple layout wrapper that composes the Navigation, main content slot, and Footer into a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/LogoDownloadButt: Button that opens a popup window containing the SCLC logo with title and tagline, then auto-triggers the browser print dialog so the user can save it as a PDF.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with the SCLC logo, smooth-scroll nav links, a 'Get in Touch' CTA button, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/SCLCLogo.tsx: Renders the SCLC logo image asset with a corrected 'Ek Nayi Ummeed' text overlay (covering a typo baked into the image), supporting color and white variants.
Displays a grid of six therapy service cards (Speech, OT, Physio, Behavioral, Special Ed, Sensory) with icons, descriptions, and tags under a styled section header.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state, AuthClient creation, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a `useSubmitInquiry` React Query mutation hook that calls the actor's `submitInquiry` method and invalidates the inquiries query cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind directives, defining CSS custom properties for a warm/saffron color theme in both light and dark modes, plus utility gradient classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component that composes and renders the Hero, About, Services, and Contact sections in sequence.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing functions to extract URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routes, persist them in sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Nunito/Inter), OKLCH-based color palettes (warm, sage, golden), border radii, box shadows, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, known issues, and feature requests — currently focused on correcting a logo text misspelling from 'Ek Nayi Umheed' to 'Ek Nayi Ummeed'.
